ab: yau ta leppawan ti bai ni?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: yau, yau ta qinpanan maynep aizipna.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: yau ta leppawan ti bai ni?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: mai, Rulusit aizipna, qaRabi qawka tanan.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: yau ta leppawan ti baqi ni?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: yau ta saqazusa maletuttut, tuqaz ka aisu kilim timaizipana.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: yau lazat ta leppawan ni?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: ti aki ka, tenes ti mai temayta timaisuan, nengi isu ni?
ch: B:是Aki阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Aki. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: nengi ti yu! mawtu iku kemilim timaisuan sidadak.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: yau tanian tama su?
en: Where is your father?

ab: yau ta sammayan maRtik tu tamun, qeRasan ku pa aizipna.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: matiw seni ti umus?
en: Where did umus go?

ab: matiw sa Rupu na taquq aizipna qemapaR tu taquq.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: baqi, mawtu ti imi.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: mai baqi numi ta leppawan, yau ta zennan aizipna, ta leppawan ka aimu melana tu tananan na.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: tama mawtu ti isu ka!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: tenes mai simtayta, ibabaw ti isu.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: qalizaqan temayta tu mawtu isu.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: sabulan timaimuan unglay zau, seppaw ika ta suRena ay qabtuanan.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: tenes tu nazau mai mawtu, tingaRan ku pa meniz tu qawtuan qeman.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: naRin ti paqelabut, menanum ti iku tu ucia nengi ti, qawtu pa ita sa temunaw sidadak.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: wanay tu nipasipen su, tanan pa iku ti.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: Ru’tung taquq zau, azas ika patanan paqanas ika qeman aisu.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
